title: Graph Data Model Visualization
description: An interactive vis-network graph of an IT infrastructure that demonstrates the node, edge, and property data model with filtering, multi-hop traversal, critical-path, and impact analysis.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Explore the property-graph data model by examining nodes, edges, and their properties and tracing dependencies through an IT infrastructure graph.
